scripts.build: npm install && cd client && npm install && npm run build && cd .. && node -e "const fs=require('fs'); if(fs.existsSync('server/public')) fs.rmSync('server/public', {recursive:true}); fs.mkdirSync('server/public', {recursive:true}); const ncp=require('child_process'); if(process.platform==='win32') { ncp.execSync('xcopy /E /I /Y \"client\\build\\*\" \"server\\public\\\"'); } else { ncp.execSync('cp -r client/build/* server/public/'); }"
